meta.title: Expert Dietitian & Psychologist Gözde Akın | Memorial Istanbul
meta.description: Functional medicine specialist in pregnancy nutrition, PCOS, diabetes and insulin resistance. Sustainable nutrition counseling at Memorial Göztepe and Ataşehir Hospitals, Istanbul.

hero.subtitle: A holistic nutrition and psychology approach focused on metabolic improvement, insulin resistance balance, and blood biochemistry optimization.

about.title: Expert Dietitian & Psychologist
about.intro: As a healthcare professional, I combine nutrition and psychology with a holistic approach to support both physical and mental well-being.
about.bio1: I graduated 2nd in Nutrition and Dietetics and 3rd in the Faculty of Health Sciences at Okan University. I completed a double major in Psychology and earned my master's degree to become a Specialist Dietitian.
about.bio2: From 2017 to 2023, I served as lead dietitian at Memorial Ataşehir Hospital. I gained international experience in Canada. I currently see patients at Memorial Göztepe Hospital.
about.bio3: I focus not only on weight management but also on behavior change and sustainable lifestyle habits for my clients.
about.missionText: To provide science-based, sustainable health solutions centered on helping people.
about.visionText: To build Turkey's most trusted functional medicine nutrition platform by combining nutrition and psychology.

whyChoose.title: Science-Based, Personalized Approach
whyChoose.scienceBasedDesc: Evidence-based nutrition protocols and current medical literature.
whyChoose.personalizedDesc: Custom nutrition plans tailored to each client's biochemistry.
whyChoose.psychologyNutritionDesc: Holistic approach with behavior change and emotional eating support.
whyChoose.medicalAnalysisDesc: Data-driven follow-up with blood tests and body analysis.
whyChoose.longTermDesc: No crash diets — sustainable metabolic improvement.
whyChoose.noCrashDietsDesc: Measurable, lasting results instead of miracle promises.

faq.title: Your Questions Answered
faq.q1: What happens in the first consultation?
faq.a1: A detailed assessment, nutrition habits analysis, goal setting, and blood test referral if needed.
faq.a2: Yes, consultation services are available via online video calls from Turkey and abroad.
faq.q3: Should I only consult for weight loss?
faq.a3: No. Services are also provided for PCOS, diabetes, insulin resistance, pregnancy nutrition, and functional medicine.
faq.a4: Yes. Psychological support for emotional eating, motivation loss, and behavior change is part of the holistic approach.
faq.q5: How do I book an appointment?
faq.a5: You can book via WhatsApp, phone, or the website.
